message:
fix(actor): propagate actual cancel reason in ActorHandle::join

When the actor's oneshot result channel is dropped without sending
(indicating the actor task was cancelled or the runtime shut down),
ActorHandle::join previously always returned a generic race_loser()
cancel reason. This lost the real cancellation context.

Now queries cx.cancel_reason() to retrieve the actual reason (e.g.,
budget exhaustion, explicit cancellation, timeout) and falls back to
parent_cancelled for scope teardown cases where no explicit reason
is recorded. This gives callers accurate diagnostics about why an
actor was cancelled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
